home.hero_desc1: A Japanese learning materials download site for those teaching children Japanese.
home.hero_desc2: Ready-to-use tools for both school and home.
home.register_cta: Sign up to access all features
home.login_prompt_signup: Sign up if you don't have an account
home.login_to_dl: Log in to view your download history
home.login_to_purchases: Log in to view your purchase history

materials_modal.title: Find Materials
materials_modal.register_to_download: Sign up to download all materials.
materials_modal.fav_limit_desc: toolio free users can save up to 5 favorites. To add this material, adjust your favorites in history.
materials_modal.fav_limit_upgrade_desc: Upgrade your plan for unlimited favorites.
materials_modal.subscribe_upgrade_desc: Upgrade to a subscription plan to use this material right now.

purchase.success_label:
has been purchased.
You can download it now.
purchase.title: Purchase Material
purchase.subtitle: You can download immediately after purchase.
purchase.pay_disclaimer: By clicking 'Pay now', the above amount will be charged to your card.
purchase.error_payment: Payment failed. Please check your card information and try again.
purchase.error_server: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
purchase.error_network: A network error occurred. Please check your connection and try again.

billing.title: Billing History
billing.withdrawal_cancelled: Withdrawal cancelled. You can continue using your account.
billing.cancel_withdrawal_desc_1: Cancelling the withdrawal means you can continue using your account after
billing.cancel_withdrawal_desc_3: Your current plan will remain active.
billing.reactivate_cancelled: Cancellation undone. You can continue using your account.
billing.cancel_confirmed: Cancellation scheduled. You can use the service until the end of the period.
billing.cancel_confirm_desc_1: After cancellation, you can use the service until
billing.cancel_confirm_desc_3: After that, you will be moved to toolio free.
billing.plan_issue_desc: Due to a payment issue, your plan has been reset to toolio free. Your past billing remains unchanged. Re-registering a plan is a new contract and will not result in double billing. To continue, please select a plan from the plans page. If there is any price difference, we will contact you individually.
billing.cancel_no_sub_error: No active subscription found. It may already be cancelled.
billing.cancel_profile_error: Account not found. Please log in again and try.
billing.cancel_generic_error: Cancellation failed. Please try again later.
billing.cancel_network_error: A network error occurred. Please check your connection and try again.
billing.withdrawal_cancel_error: Failed to cancel withdrawal. Please try again later.
billing.withdrawal_network_error: A network error occurred. Please check your connection and try again.

mypage_ext.email_change_sent_desc2: Click the link to confirm the change.
mypage_ext.email_change_note: Until you click the link, your current email remains active. Check your spam folder if you don't receive the email.
mypage_ext.free_plan_confirm_desc3: After that, you will be moved to toolio free.
mypage_ext.free_plan_success_desc: After the current plan period ends, you will be moved to toolio free.
mypage_ext.delete_check_data: All data including favorites, download history, and purchase history will be saved. You can restart at any time.
mypage_ext.delete_check_subscription: If you have an active subscription, it will automatically be changed to toolio free upon withdrawal (no refund). You can use the service until the end of the period.
mypage_ext.delete_check_return: You can restart at any time with the same email address. Account recovery instructions will be provided after re-login.
mypage_ext.delete_confirm_desc: Even after deletion, you can resume your account at any time by logging in with the same email address. All data will be retained.
mypage_ext.delete_done_desc2: — your account will be automatically deleted.
mypage_ext.delete_done_desc3: Come back anytime. We'll be waiting.
mypage_ext.delete_done_desc_no_end: Your account will be automatically deleted after the current plan period ends.
mypage_ext.fav_empty_desc: Save materials using the heart button
mypage_ext.fav_limit_free_desc: toolio free users can save up to 5 items
mypage_ext.not_logged_in_dl: Log in to view your download history
mypage_ext.not_logged_in_purchases: Log in to view your purchase history
mypage_ext.save_error_permission: Permission denied. Please log in again and try.
mypage_ext.avatar_too_large: Image too large. Please use an image under 5MB.
mypage_ext.avatar_wrong_format: Unsupported format. Please use JPG, PNG, or WEBP.
mypage_ext.pw_error_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
mypage_ext.pw_error_same: Cannot use the same password as before. Please enter a different password.
mypage_ext.pw_error_session: Session expired. Please log in again.
mypage_ext.pw_error_weak: Password does not meet requirements. Please use at least 8 characters.
mypage_ext.email_error_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
mypage_ext.email_error_same: This is the same as your current email address
mypage_ext.email_error_rate: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
mypage_ext.email_error_exists: This email address is already used by another account.
mypage_ext.email_error_generic: Change failed. Please try again later.
mypage_ext.delete_error_generic: Deletion failed. Please try again later.
mypage_ext.delete_error_timeout: Request timed out. Please try again later.
mypage_ext.delete_error_network: A network error occurred. Please try again later.
mypage_ext.free_plan_error_reset: Subscription info has an issue. Please reload the page and try again.
mypage_ext.free_plan_error_no_sub: No active subscription found. You may already be on the free plan.
mypage_ext.free_plan_error_generic: Change failed. Please try again later.
